HeroSubtitle: A quieter control surface for Codex completion monitoring, tray control, and iPhone push delivery.
TrayHint: Close or minimize to keep it running in the tray.
TrayHintSafer: Minimize stays on the taskbar. Use Hide To Tray when you want to send it into the tray.
PreferencesDescription: Keep service controls close, then tune how the monitor behaves.
NotificationsDescription: These values control where delivery goes and which local dashboard port the app uses.
SettingsSavedImmediately: Changes save into the local config files immediately.
SettingsNotLoadedYet: Settings could not be loaded yet.
BehaviorDescription: Tray mode and startup still live in the menu for now, but their live state is summarized here.
SettingsSummaryMenu: Use the Options menu or tray menu to change startup and tray icon behavior.
NotesDescription: Buttons disable themselves when an action is not useful.
ActivityDescription: Live session output and delivery state.
AutoRefreshTemporaryConflict: Auto refresh hit a temporary read conflict. The app will retry on the next cycle.
AutoRefreshRepeatedFailure: Auto refresh has failed {0} times in a row. Live status may be briefly stale.
AutoRefreshRecovered: Live status recovered. Auto refresh is healthy again.
RecentLogCopied: Recent log copied to the clipboard.
SystemNotesCopied: System notes copied to the clipboard.
MonitorLogMissing: The monitor log file does not exist yet.
StateFileMissing: The state file does not exist yet.
DashboardPortInteger: Dashboard port must be a valid integer.
SettingsSavedRestartRequired: Settings saved. Restart Services to move the dashboard to the new port.
SettingsSavedRestartApply: Settings saved. Restart Services to apply the new dashboard port.
ClearingAndRebuilding: Clearing old logs and rebuilding status
CleanupRebuildCompleted: Cleanup complete. Archived {0} file(s) and rebuilt live status.
CleanupRebuildFallback: Cleanup complete. Old logs were archived and live status was rebuilt.
MinimizedToTray: Codex Monitor is minimized to the tray.
MinimizedToTaskbar: Codex Monitor was minimized to the taskbar to avoid losing access.
StillRunningInTray: Codex Monitor is still running in the tray.
TrayUnavailableKeepWindow: Tray icon is unavailable right now, so the window stayed visible.
ActionNotesRunning: Everything is already alive. Restart if you want to re-seat both services cleanly.
ActionNotesStopped: Both services are resting. Start will bring the monitor and dashboard back together.
ActionNotesMonitorOnly: The monitor is healthy but the dashboard is sleeping. Open Dashboard or Start will restore it.
ActionNotesDashboardOnly: The dashboard is visible without the monitor. Start or Restart will restore the background worker.
SettingsSummaryOn: Windows logon startup is enabled. Tray icon mode: {0}.
SettingsSummaryOff: Windows logon startup is off. Enable it from Options or the tray menu. Tray icon mode: {0}.
